> Drupal USWDS AI Components — Drupal implementation knowledge for USWDS
> Maps each USWDS component to its Drupal module, paragraph type, Twig template, and configuration.
> Home: https://github.com/ednark/drupal-uswds-ai-components
> Base layer: https://github.com/ednark/ai-component-registry-spec (submodule at _base/)
> Companion design registry: https://github.com/ednark/uswds-ai-components

---

## Overview

Drupal USWDS AI Components is a registry that tells AI agents HOW to implement USWDS components in Drupal. It is a companion to uswds-ai-components (which tells agents WHICH component to use).

## Machine manifest

> https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ednark/drupal-uswds-ai-components/main/agents.json

---

## Quick start

1. Filter vocab: GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ednark/drupal-uswds-ai-components/main/infinite/facets.json
2. Discovery index: GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ednark/drupal-uswds-ai-components/main/infinite/components.index.json
3. Component source: GET https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ednark/drupal-uswds-ai-components/main/infinite/{file}

---

## Facets

- implementationType — paragraph_bundle, theme_region, field_type, twig_template, custom_module
- drupalModule — uswds, uswds_paragraph_components, plotly_js, custom
- uswdsComponent — accordion, alert, button, card, etc.
- paragraphType — uswds_accordion, uswds_alert, uswds_card, etc. (when applicable)
- themeRegion — header, footer, breadcrumb, etc. (when applicable)
- complexity — simple, moderate, complex
- drupalVersion — ^10.1, ^11, ^12

---

## Drupal modules

- uswds (base theme) — regions, libraries, subtheming
- uswds_paragraph_components (by smustgrave) — paragraph bundles for 8 USWDS components
- plotly_js — field type for charts

---

## Two-registry pattern

Step 1: Query uswds-ai-components for design guidance (which component, when, HTML pattern)
Step 2: Query this registry for implementation guidance (which module, paragraph type, Twig, Drush)

---

## Theme override guidance

Canonical guide:

> https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ednark/drupal-uswds-ai-components/main/guides/uswds-theme-overrides.md

Use the lowest appropriate layer: existing USWDS component or utility, USWDS Sass setting, scoped custom style, runtime CSS custom property, Drupal render array or preprocess, specific Twig override, then Drupal JavaScript behavior. Avoid inline styles and preserve every component constraint.

The absence of a paragraph bundle does not by itself justify a Twig override.

---

## Adaptation metadata fields

Each tile includes:
- drupalModule — which module provides this
- paragraphType — paragraph bundle machine name (if applicable)
- twigTemplate — Twig template naming pattern
- preprocessFunction — hook_preprocess function name
- drushCommands — commands to install/configure
- configYaml — config import YAML
- scssSettings — USWDS SCSS theme settings
- fieldDefinitions — Drupal field definitions
- dependencies — required Drupal modules
